sql_array: CREATE TABLE time_intervals (id INTEGER, interval_value INTERVAL);
INSERT INTO time_intervals (id, interval_value) VALUES (1, to_hours(3));
UPDATE time_intervals SET interval_value = to_hours(5) WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, interval_value FROM time_intervals WHERE interval_value > to_hours(2);
SELECT id, interval_value FROM time_intervals ORDER BY interval_value DESC;
